description: Engineering process: plan-before-code, YAGNI, SOLID principles applied with judgment, task orchestration, work verification, low-cognitive-load code, KISS/DRY simplicity principles. Owns code-level structure — units, interfaces, file placement; defers system-level topology (service boundaries, scaling, caching) to the system-design plugin.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Engineering process: plan-before-code with current-vs-target architecture diagrams on a live preview URL for structural changes, YAGNI checks, task orchestration, work verification, low-cognitive-load code, KISS/DRY simplicity principles, SOLID principles applied with judgment, and always-on surgical-coding discipline (surface assumptions, every changed line traces to the request, orphan rule, verifiable success criteria — after Karpathy's LLM-coding guidelines). Includes /code-architecture:plan|verify|yagni|solid and an architecture-reviewer agent. Owns code-level structure; defers system-level topology (service boundaries, scaling, caching) to the system-design plugin.

Codex fidelity: 8 faithful, 5 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Engineering process: plan-before-code, YAGNI, SOLID principles applied with judgment, task orchestration, work verification, low-cognitive-load code, KISS/DRY simplicity principles. Owns code-level structure — units, interfaces, file placement; defers system-level topology (service boundaries, scaling, caching) to the system-design plugin.

name: code-architecture
